passage: The Riverside gym offers four membership options. The standard plan gives access every day, while the peak plan is cheaper but only suits people who train at quieter times. A family plan covers two adults and up to two children, and the student plan includes a discount for members with a current college card. Anyone who wants to pause training for a holiday can freeze the account for one month without losing the joining fee. The notice explains that all members may use the changing rooms and water stations, but towel hire costs extra unless it is included in a premium package.
instructions: Complete the table below. Use NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.

cells.evidence: The standard plan gives access every day
cells.explanation: The standard plan allows daily access.
The peak plan is the lower-cost option.

cells.evidence: A family plan covers two adults and up to two children
freeze the account for one month
cells.explanation: The account can be paused for one month.

passage: New staff in the warehouse begin with a safety briefing on Monday morning, followed by a tour of the building. On Tuesday afternoon they complete an equipment demonstration and practise packing goods under supervision. Wednesday is reserved for an introduction to the digital logbook, while Thursday gives each worker time to shadow a team mentor. The week ends with a short review session so the supervisor can answer any final questions. The manager says the schedule is designed to introduce one skill at a time rather than overwhelm new employees with too much information on the first day.
instructions: Complete the table below. Use NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.

cells.evidence: New staff ... begin with a safety briefing on Monday morning
cells.explanation: The first scheduled activity is the safety briefing.

cells.evidence: On Tuesday afternoon they complete an equipment demonstration
cells.explanation: The Tuesday activity is the equipment demonstration.

cells.evidence: Thursday gives each worker time to shadow a team mentor
cells.explanation: Workers shadow a team mentor on Thursday.

cells.evidence: The week ends with a short review session
cells.explanation: The final activity is a short review session.

passage: The city transport office now offers several discounts to regular users. Off-peak travel is charged at half price, which makes later buses cheaper for commuters with flexible hours. Students can also buy a term pass, but they must show a valid ID card when registering. Seniors receive a lower fare before noon, and children under five travel free with a paying adult. The final option is a weekend card that gives a return trip at no extra cost on routes across the centre. Staff say the new system is meant to encourage people to leave their cars at home on busy shopping days.
instructions: Complete the table below. Use NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.

cells.evidence: Off-peak travel is charged at half price
cells.explanation: The off-peak discount is half price.

cells.evidence: Students can also buy a term pass
cells.explanation: The student option is the term pass.

cells.evidence: Seniors receive a lower fare before noon
cells.explanation: The senior discount applies before noon.

cells.evidence: the weekend card ... gives a return trip at no extra cost
cells.explanation: The weekend card includes a return trip.
